name: Facilities
title: Explore our facilities
desc: We offer a unique experience with our independent rooms, providing privacy and comfort. Enjoy panoramic views from our terraces, perfect for relaxing. Stroll through our lush gardens and immerse yourself in the tranquility of nature. In addition, we have a refreshing swimming pool for your enjoyment. Come and live an unforgettable stay.

image.alt: Panoramic views of the gardens and the Villa's structure
Triple room with blue wall and garden view

name: Services
title: Meet our services
desc: Enjoy delicious Cuban gastronomy prepared by local chefs, transportation to explore the region, and the assistance of our trip planner to make the most of your stay. Additionally, we offer laundry service, relaxing massages to recharge your energy, and dance classes to immerse yourself in Cuban culture.

image.alt: Table served with traditional Cuban dishes
Cozy view of the interior of Villa Los Reyes restaurant with arranged wooden tables and rustic decor
Classic American red car (DeSoto) parked in front of Villa Los Reyes, available for transfers and tours.
Top view of hands pointing at a map on a wooden table with coffee, a vintage camera, and a passport
